name: Chocolate-Covered Cherries
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds dipping chocolate or white chocolate (for coating)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the Maraschino cherries thoroughly and place them on paper towel.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter or margarine, corn syrup, and salt. Stir in the sifted confectioner's sugar until smooth. If the mixture is too soft, chill it for a few minutes.
3. Shape about 1 teaspoon of the sugar mixture around each cherry. Place the cherries on a wax paper-lined baking sheet and refrigerate until set.
4. In a small, heavy saucepan, melt chocolate, stirring constantly. Do not add any liquid.
5. Holding the cherries by their stems, dip them one at a time into the chocolate. Spoon additional chocolate over the cherries to coat evenly.
6. Return the coated cherries to the baking sheet and refrigerate until the chocolate is hardened.
7. Store the chocolate-covered cherries in a covered container in a cool place. Allow them to "ripen" for a week or two before serving.
